caption:
The campus clock struck 11 PM, but my office was still glowing with the soft hum of my power. I adjusted the hem of my pencil skirt, feeling the silk slide against my legs as I pushed open the heavy oak door. 😈 Students loved me, but tonight, I was feeling the thrill of the chase. My blouse hugged every curve beneath the layers, my cleavage barely contained by the buttons, and I knew the fabric whispered secrets against my skin. When I turned to lock the door, the student I'd invited for extra credit leaned in, his breath warm on my neck.
'So,' he whispered, eyes scanning my silhouette,
'does this mean the lecture is just for the bold?' I smiled, biting my lip, letting the tension build. The air was thick with the scent of old books and something electric. I turned back, my skirt riding up just enough to tease, and placed my hand on his desk, fingers tracing the edge.
'Good,' I murmured, voice low and sultry.
'Because I haven't finished teaching you everything... yet.' The night was long, and the lecture hall outside was silent, waiting for us. The moonlight caught the sheen of my hair, making me feel like a goddess in a library of shadows. 🍷

#university #teacher #lateNight #curves #confident #alluring #nightout
